name: Personal Facts
description: Standard identity and preference facts for memory testing.
statements: I am a software engineer specializing in distributed systems and actor-based concurrency.
I live in a small town in the Italian Alps called Aosta.
My favorite programming language is TypeScript, but I also enjoy Rust for performance-critical tasks.
I have a golden retriever named 'Baco' who is 3 years old.
I recently started a project called 'Rorschach', which is an autonomous agent framework.
I am allergic to peanuts and shellfish.
I enjoy mountain biking during the summer and skiing in the winter.
I am currently learning to play the piano, specifically focusing on jazz improvisation.
My preferred setup for development is a 14-inch MacBook Pro with a mechanical keyboard (Keychron K2).
I usually drink double espresso in the morning and herbal tea in the evening.
I visited Lisbon for a tech conference from April 15 to April 20, 2026.
I watched 'Interstellar' with friends on the evening of May 4, 2026.
I bought my Keychron keyboard on February 1, 2026.
